subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Mahdi! Thy remembrance hath been made mention of, and repeatedly hast thou attained unto the effulgent rays of the Luminary of Manifestation. The whole world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد مهدی ذکرت مذکور مکرر بتجلیات انوار نیر ظهور فائز گشتی جمیع عالم از
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
